title: Schauwerk Companion host security hardening
goal: Move or front the proven Miro Companion with a free durable HTTPS host that emits the complete required security-header contract while preserving deterministic bytes and successful Miro embedding.
completion: A free durable host serves the exact deterministic companion build under repository-controlled deployment.
CSP including the intended frame-ancestors policy, X-Frame-Options policy as applicable, Permissions-Policy, Referrer-Policy and X-Content-Type-Options are verified from real responses.
The fail-closed release doctor passes against the live host and the companion still loads inside authenticated Miro.
No paid service, weakened TLS, secret exposure or unverified proxy path is introduced.

metadata.source: Schauwerk PR #100 Pages and Miro closeout
metadata.live_finding: GitHub Pages is durable and embeds successfully in Miro, but actual responses omit CSP, X-Frame-Options, Permissions-Policy, Referrer-Policy and X-Content-Type-Options. Therefore the public HTTPS fallback passes while the full release doctor correctly fails.
does_not_establish: that current Miro embedding is blocked
permission to weaken the release doctor

implementation_progress.repository_host: Merged in heimgewebe/schauwerk#102 and runtime-CSP closeout #104.
implementation_progress.public_runtime: Verified Tailscale Funnel at https://heimberry.tail6dbb90.ts.net/ with release-doctor PASS.
implementation_progress.miro: Verified in Education team with only boards:read; launcher, catalogue click, panel and frame readback passed.

metadata.outcome: The free persistent Tailscale Funnel serves the exact deterministic companion release with the full header contract, and authenticated Miro launcher, catalogue entry, panel and read-only SDK calls are verified.
